    Advice about Tariff Concession Orders​

    Tariff ClassificationTCO NumberTCO descriptionOperative dateDecision date
    5801.10.999903602 
    FABRIC, WOOL PILE, PAINT ROLLER, woven textile backing, having
 ALL of the following:
   (a) a man-made fibre content NOT exceeding 25%;
   (b) pile height between 8 mm and 38 mm (both inclusive);
   (c) a thermal bonding acrylic latex backing
    		21/05/199913/08/1999
    5801.10.999403561 
    MOHAIR PILE FABRIC on a woven textile backing
    		08/03/199421/06/1994
    5801.90.909903603 
    FABRIC, PILE, PAINT ROLLER, woven textile backing, with OR
  without a fusible filament within the weave, having ALL of the
  following:
    (a) a combination of ANY of the following fibres:
          (i) polyester;
         (ii) acrylic;
        (iii) modacrylic;
         (iv) polyethylene;
          (v) nylon;
    (b) pile height between 3 mm and 30 mm (both inclusive);
    (c) thermal bonding backing of acrylic latex coating
    		21/05/199913/08/1999
    5806.10.009709314 
    TAPES, FASTENING SYSTEM, hook or loop, having a cut or uncut pile,
 whether or not coated with adhesive
    		23/10/199709/01/1998
    5806.10.009610341 
    RIBBONS, velvet, having woven edges on both sides, width NOT
 exceeding 55 mm
    		23/10/199706/01/1998
    5806.20.009705582 
    WEBBING, ELASTOMERIC, with a composition of rubber and
 polypropylene, having ALL of the following:
   (a) warp and weft construction;
   (b) rubber content minimum 25% but NOT exceeding 55%;
   (c) polypropylene content minimum 45% but NOT exceeding 75%;
   (d) minimum elongation of 50%;
   (e) minimum width of 45 mm
    		26/06/199727/11/1997
    5806.20.009610340 
    WEBBING, elastomeric, rubber and polypropylene composition,
 having ALL of the following:
 (a) warp and weft construction;
 (b) rubber content of at least 25%, but NOT exceeding 45%;
 (c) polypropylene content of at least 55%, but NOT exceeding 75%
    		23/10/199707/01/1998
    5806.31.009610352 
    FABRIC, woven, cotton body huckaback weave, polyester cotton
 selvedges, width NOT exceeding 28 cm
    		23/10/199706/01/1998
    5806.31.000618606

  (a) width NOT greater than 20 cm;
  (c) length NOT greater than 2.6 m unstretched or NOT greater 
      than 5 m stretched
    		16/11/200609/02/2007

    RIBBON, woven edge, width NOT greater than 3 mm
